title: DEAL's Shinies
description: Adds "some" shinies for Cobblemon designed by me and a pal of mine.
body:
Adds _some_ shinies for Cobblemon designed by me and a pal of mine.

**Current Shinies included in the pack:**
1. Bulbasaur
2. Charizard
3. Weedle
4. Pikachu
5. Raichu
6. Sandshrew
7. Nidoqueen
8. Nidoking
9. Galarian Meowth
10. Mankey
11. Primeape
12. Poliwag
13. Poliwhirl
14. Poliwrath
15. Abra
16. Kadabra
17. Bellsprout
18. Weepinbell
19. Victreebel
20. Slowpoke
21. Farfetched
22. Gengar
23. Krabby
24. Kingler
25. Cubone
26. Marowak
27. Hitmonlee
28. Hitmonchan
29. Scyther
30. Kabuto
31. Kabutops
32. Snorlax
33. Dratini
34. Dragonair
35. Dragonite
36. Sentret
37. Crobat
38. Pichu
39. Slowking
40. Scizor
41. Heracross
42. Magcargo
43. Tyrogue
44. Hitmontop
45. Lombre

47. Shiftry
48. Ralts
49. Kirlia
50. Gardevoir
51. Plusle
52. Minun
53. Numel
54. Lunatone
55. Solrock
56. Tropius
57. Mime Jr
58. Gabite
59. Garchomp
60. Munchlax
61. Riolu
62. Lucario

64. Gallade
65. Dusknoir
66. Venipede

68. Basculin

70. Yamask
71. Perrserker
72. Kleavor
73. Tandemaus
74. Maushold
75. Tinkatink
76. Tinkatuff
77. Tinkaton
78. Annihilape

**Pack also includes 3 patches contained within the main zip file:**
- Cobble-Remodels Compatibility (Link to Cobble-Remodels, they make good stuff: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobble-remodels](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobble-remodels))
- Matching Charmander & Charmeleon with Charizard's Gen 3 Shiny (Charizard texture from base Cobblemon)
- Goth Gardevoir
